/usr/lib64/ccache/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -pie -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now CMakeFiles/spacegl_3dview.dir/src/spacegl_3dview.c.o -o spacegl_3dview  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib64: /usr/lib64/libcrypto.so -lm -lrt /usr/local/lib64/libglut.so /usr/lib64/libXmu.so /usr/lib64/libXi.so /usr/lib64/libGLEW.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libGLU.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-redhat-linux/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib64/libpthread.a
